action_set_definitions.name: get_order_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the specific items, quantities, and status of a given Order ID.

order_id.description: The unique identifier of the order (e.g., 'ORD-707').

action_set_definitions.name: get_sku_hazmat_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves safety data for a SKU, including Hazard Class, Packing Group, and IATA volume limits for different transport modes.

action_set_definitions.name: query_inventory_location
action_set_definitions.description: Finds the specific warehouse zone/shelf where a SKU is stored.

action_set_definitions.name: list_available_robots
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all autonomous mobile robots (AMRs) that are currently idle and their locations.

action_set_definitions.name: list_warehouse_zones
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of zone IDs for specific warehouse functions like 'packing_station' or 'shipping_dock'.

zone_type.description: The type of zone to find.

action_set_definitions.name: get_compliant_packaging
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of available packaging materials that meet specific IATA Packing Group requirements.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_robot_task
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a robot to move to a location, pick an item, or drop an item.

target_id.description: The ID of the location or the SKU.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_and_document
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the packing of the order and generates mandatory IATA DGR regulatory documentation (Shipper's Declaration).

compliance_declaration.description: Must be true to confirm IATA standards are met.

state_description.inventory: A mapping of SKU IDs to their current location and quantity in the warehouse.
state_description.robots: The current status of all autonomous mobile robots (AMRs), including their location and held items.
state_description.orders: A list of customer orders to be fulfilled, tracking their progress and required SKUs.
state_description.map_layout: Defines connections between different warehouse zones (e.g., shelves, packing stations, docks).
